R0204.title: Gas费操纵与抢跑
R0204.definition: 矿工或验证者利用交易排序权，通过Gas费竞价抢跑用户交易，或与套利机器人串谋获取MEV收益。
R0204.influence: DeFi用户交易滑点增大，利益受损

references.title: Flash Boys 2.0: Frontrunning in Decentralized Exchanges
Ethereum is a Dark Forest - MEV Threats
